positive: A highly intricate, neo-tribal geometric floral mandala featuring blooming cosmic lilies and flowing celestial ribbons. The composition is perfectly symmetrical and centered, designed as a seamless repeating pattern for apparel. Use clean, sharp line art contrasting against a muted midnight blue and deep teal background. Focus on strong silhouettes, clean black ink elements, and ethereal glowing gold accents, giving the piece a mystical, high-contrast, tattoo-style aesthetic. Minimalist depth, elegant complexity, perfect for screen printing.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, ugly, noise, grainy, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, low contrast, bokeh
